pageDescription: Manage your data and storage preferences
exportStarted: Data export started. You will be notified when ready.
deleteAccountWarning: Account deletion is irreversible. Please contact support.
exportDescription: Download a copy of your data
exportBody: Download a copy of your data including chats, contacts, and settings.
clearCacheBody: Clear locally cached data. This will not delete your messages or files.
deleteAccountBody: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
sessionBody: Sign out of your account on this device.
